# UC-15.5.9 · Hikvision ISAPI Camera Tamper and Vandalism Events

> **Criticality:** High &middot; **Difficulty:** Intermediate &middot; **Pillar:** Observability &middot; **Type:** Physical Security, Safety &middot; **Status:** Verified

*We watch the physical data center for power, cooling, environment, and physical access.*

---

## Description

Tamper events indicate physical interference or environmental displacement requiring guard response.

## Value

Shortens response to sabotage attempts at sensitive perimeters.

## Implementation

(1) Enable ISAPI event subscription to HEC. (2) Deduplicate vibration spikes. (3) Correlate with access logs.

## SPL

```spl
index=physical sourcetype="hikvision:isapi" earliest=-7d
| where match(lower(event_type), "(?i)tamper|vandal|cover|defocus")
| stats count by camera_id site
```

## Visualization

Timeline events; map pins.

## Known False Positives

Sensor anomalies during cleaning, calibration, or planned environmental changes.

## References

- [ONVIF — Open Network Video Interface Forum](https://www.onvif.org/)
- [Hikvision OpenAPI / ISAPI](https://www.hikvision.com/en/support/download/sdk/)
